name: Pinnacle Incorporated
message: The Pinnacle group is a primary care pioneer – and we’re proud of that. We’re inquisitive, innovative and evolve with purpose – we’re proud to be constantly pushing the boundaries. We know a strong health system centres around high quality primary care and community services that are continually developing and evolving to meet local need. We play our part by ensuring the right resources and capacity are in place so our patients and our network can thrive.
